Dialog.Title: Spend Experience
Dialog.NotEnough: Not enough XP! You can mark it as free.

Deduct.Title: Deduct Experience
Deduct.ExceedsTotal: Spent XP cannot exceed total XP pool!

ReputationConfig.Title: Reputation Settings
ReputationConfig.Label: Configure Reputation
ReputationConfig.Hint: Opens the reputation system configuration menu: test modes, value ranges, and relation tables.
ReputationConfig.MinMaxError: Minimum reputation value cannot be higher than the maximum.

ReputationTestMode.Name: Reputation test mode
ReputationTestMode.Hint: Choose how reputation is tested: skill-like test (threshold = value + fame) or simple 1d100 roll.

ReputationUseColors.Name: Use colors for relations
ReputationUseColors.Hint: Displays the color assigned to each relation level on the character sheet.

ReputationColorNames.Name: Use colors for reputation name
ReputationColorNames.Hint: Displays the reputation item name in the color of its matching relation on the character sheet reputation tab.

ReputationFameThreshold.Name: Reputation → Fame threshold
ReputationFameThreshold.Hint: How many reputation points in a single item must be reached to automatically gain fame points.

ReputationFamePoints.Name: Fame points per threshold
ReputationFamePoints.Hint: How many fame points the player receives upon reaching the reputation threshold.

ReputationShowAsProgressBar.Name: Show relation as progress bar
ReputationShowAsProgressBar.Hint: Instead of the relation name, displays an animated progress bar colored by the relation with the name shown inside.

EncumbranceConfig.Title: Encumbrance Settings
EncumbranceConfig.Label: Configure Encumbrance
EncumbranceConfig.Hint: Opens the configuration menu for calculating actor encumbrance.
EncumbranceConfig.Saved: Encumbrance settings have been saved and updated.

CombatConfig.Title: Combat Settings
CombatConfig.Label: Configure Combat
CombatConfig.Hint: Opens the configuration menu for combat mechanics and interface visibility.

DistanceConfig.Title: Distance Settings
DistanceConfig.Label: Configure Distances
DistanceConfig.MenuHint: Opens the range penalty table for ranged weapon types.
DistanceConfig.Hint: Percentage penalties per distance bracket and weapon type. Empty means out of range.

EnableEncumbrance.Name: Encumbrance System
EnableEncumbrance.Hint: Enables item weight system and character encumbrance calculation.

DebugMode.Name: Debug Mode
DebugMode.Hint: Enables additional logs in the developer console for diagnostic purposes.

RequireBuildOnItems.Name: Require build on weapons and armors
RequireBuildOnItems.Hint: Determines if the system should check build requirement for weapons and armors.

AllowCombatShift.Name: Allow Suwak in combat
AllowCombatShift.Hint: Enables the Suwak rule (difficulty shifts) during combat actions.

AllowPainResistanceShift.Name: Allow Suwak in pain resistance
AllowPainResistanceShift.Hint: Enables the Suwak rule during automatic pain resistance tests.

FireCorrection.Name: Fire Correction
FireCorrection.Hint: Displays fire correction info on failed ranged bursts (3 bullets per failure point to correct).

MeleeCombatType.Name: Melee Combat System
MeleeCombatType.Hint: Select which melee combat system is active. Changing this setting requires a reload.
MeleeCombatType.ActiveNotice: Active melee combat system: {system}. This mode does not use the duel application.

MeleeBonusMode.Name: Melee Weapon Bonus Application
MeleeBonusMode.Hint: Select where the melee weapon attack/defense bonus is applied.

DoubleSkillAction.Name: Double Skill Action Rule
DoubleSkillAction.Hint: If disabled, the system automatically optimizes rolls. If enabled, it allows manual point subtraction from own dice and addition to opponent's dice.

RollTooltipMinRole.Name: Minimum Role for Tooltip
RollTooltipMinRole.Hint: Minimum user role required to see the detailed penalty breakdown in the roll tooltip.

RollTooltipOwnerVisibility.Name: Show Tooltip to Owner
RollTooltipOwnerVisibility.Hint: Always show the detailed penalty breakdown to the owner of the roll (and GM), regardless of their role.

ItemCardPreventSelfTake.Name: Block self-take from chat card
ItemCardPreventSelfTake.Hint: When enabled, the actor who posted an item to chat cannot take it back from the chat card.

UsePelletCountLimit.Name: Pellet count limit
UsePelletCountLimit.Hint: Enables limiting the number of hits based on the 'Pellet Count' parameter from ammunition (buckshot/birdshot simulation).

DamageApplicationMinRole.Name: Damage Panel Visibility
DamageApplicationMinRole.Hint: Minimum role required to see the damage application panel on weapon roll cards.

PainResistanceMinRole.Name: Pain Resistance Details
PainResistanceMinRole.Hint: Minimum role required to see the detailed wound list in the Pain Resistance Report.

CombatActionsMinRole.Name: Context Menu Actions
CombatActionsMinRole.Hint: Minimum role required to use Refund Ammunition and Reverse Damage options in the chat context menu.

UnjamMinRole.Name: Weapon Unjamming
UnjamMinRole.Hint: Minimum role required to use the unjam checkbox on the character sheet. Defaults to Gamemaster only.

ConditionConfig.Title: Conditions Settings
ConditionConfig.Label: Configure Conditions
ConditionConfig.MenuHint: Opens the configuration menu for actor condition states (Poisoned, Hungry, etc.).
ConditionConfig.Hint: Define and manage actor conditions. Each condition can be applied to actors and used in active effects.

Col.Name: Name
Col.AllowNegativeHint: Allow negative values (only for Integer type)

ConditionConfig.NoKeyWarning: Please set a Key/ID for this condition before editing its template.

BaseEncumbrance.Name: Base Encumbrance
BaseEncumbrance.Hint: Base weight capacity for every actor (in kg).

UseConstitutionBonus.Name: Constitution Bonus
UseConstitutionBonus.Hint: Whether to include weight capacity bonus from Constitution attribute.

EncumbranceThreshold.Name: Encumbrance Threshold
EncumbranceThreshold.Hint: At what Constitution value to start counting weight bonuses.

EncumbranceBonusInterval.Name: Bonus Interval
EncumbranceBonusInterval.Hint: How many points of Constitution above threshold are required for each bonus step.

EncumbranceBonusValue.Name: Bonus Value
EncumbranceBonusValue.Hint: How many kilograms are added to capacity for each bonus step.

PatientCardVersion.Name: Patient Card Version
PatientCardVersion.Hint: Choose which version of Patient Card to display in chat. Simple shows quick wound overview, Extended includes healing panel.

HealingConfig.Title: Healing Settings
HealingConfig.Label: Configure Healing
HealingConfig.Hint: Opens the configuration menu for base difficulty of healing tests for each damage type.
HealingConfig.Description: Here you can set the base difficulty of healing tests for each damage type. These settings will be used in the healing dialog.
HealingConfig.DifficultyHelp: Select the difficulty level to be used as default for each damage type.

HealingDifficulties.Name: Base healing difficulties
HealingDifficulties.Hint: Configuration of base difficulty levels for healing tests by damage type.

GrenadeConfig.Label: Grenade Configuration
GrenadeConfig.Title: Grenade Settings
GrenadeConfig.Hint: Configure throw bonuses based on Constitution attribute.

Errors.NotMeleeAttack: This is not a melee attack.

Warnings.NoMeleeTarget: No melee target selected. You can roll, but defense won't be available.
Warnings.NoCombatActive: Starting melee requires an active Combat.
Warnings.CannotDefend: You cannot defend against this attack (no controlled character among targets).
Warnings.MeleeNeedsDefense: Melee attacks require defense roll before applying damage.
Warnings.NotYourActor: You do not have permissions for this actor.
Warnings.NoSkillPoints: You have no more skill points to spend.
Warnings.MeleeMatchDiceCount: Defender's dice count must match attacker's dice count!
Warnings.MeleeNeedsDice: You must select at least one die to continue.

MeleeOpposed.Title: Melee Opposed
MeleeOpposed.InstructionDefender: You are being attacked in melee! Roll initiative to respond.

MeleeOpposedChat.NotYourTurn: Only the defender or GM can respond.
MeleeOpposedChat.InstructionDefender: You are being attacked! Click your melee weapon or the Join button to roll defense.
MeleeOpposedChat.AlreadyResolved: This attack has already been resolved.

MeleeDuel.Title: Melee Duel
MeleeDuel.MeleeLimitReached: Maximum of 5 attackers reached for this character.
MeleeDuel.LogExtraAttackHit: {attacker} hits {defender} with an extra attack ({s}s)! Free defense: {dice}
MeleeDuel.LogExtraAttackBlocked: {attacker} attacks {defender}, but free defense blocks the hit! Dice: {dice}
MeleeDuel.LogOpposedSuccessesHit: {attacker} hits {defender} with {net} net success(es) → tier {tier} damage!

OpposedPips.MustSelectAll: Opposed on Pips mode: you must select all 3 dice to attack.

NEUROSHIMA.NotYourSelectionTurn: It's not your turn to select dice!
NEUROSHIMA.StartInstruction: Click a melee weapon on a target to start a duel.
NEUROSHIMA.LogFullDefenseBlock: {defender} parries (Full Defense), but does not take initiative.
NEUROSHIMA.LogFuryHit: Attacker in Fury receives a counter-attack!

Hint.RollPool: Click "Roll Pool" — choose your maneuver and roll 3d20 for this turn.
Hint.RollYourDice: Roll your dice! Click the roll button on your fighter card.
Hint.WaitingPool: Pool rolled. Waiting for other participants...
Hint.ChooseTarget: Click one of the buttons below to select your primary target.
Hint.WaitingTarget: Waiting for others to choose their targets...
Hint.SelectAttack: Select 1, 2 or 3 dice as your attack strength. More successes = more damage.
Hint.WaitingAttack: Opponent is choosing attack strength. Wait for the declaration...
Hint.SelectDefense: You must select exactly {count} dice to defend. Fewer dice = the hit lands!
Hint.WaitingDefense: Defender is choosing defense dice. Wait...
Hint.ResolveReady: Exchange ready! Click "Resolve" to see the outcome.
Hint.WaitingResolve: Waiting for GM to resolve the exchange...
Hint.EndTurn: Turn over. Click "End Turn" to roll a new pool.
Hint.SelectDice: Select 1–3 dice to declare your action.

Resources.Label: Name
Resources.ToggleSummaryTooltip: Click to toggle resource visibility in the item summary
Resources.UnclampedTooltip: Ignore min/max limits — value is not clamped by the script engine

Dialogs.RerollWoundQuestion: Are you sure you want to reroll this wound test?
Dialogs.RerollTestQuestion: Are you sure you want to reroll this test?

WeaponType.Title: Select Weapon Type
WeaponType.Content: What type of weapon do you want to create?

AmmoLoading.Title: Ammo Loading
AmmoLoading.Content: How many {name} do you want to load into {mag}? (Max: {max})

CaliberMismatch.Title: Caliber Mismatch
CaliberMismatch.Content: You are trying to load {ammo} ammo into a {mag} caliber magazine. Are you sure you want to continue?

Dialog.DefenseExistsContent: A defense roll already exists for this attack. Do you want to roll again?

Notifications.SelectTargetOrPoint: Select a target on the map (LMB) to measure distance. RMB to cancel.
Notifications.NoActorTokenOnCanvas: No active token found for your character on the map.
Notifications.NoTokensSelectedOrTargeted: No tokens are selected or targeted.
Notifications.NoMagazineSelected: No magazine selected for this weapon!
Notifications.ActorNotFound: Could not find the actor associated with this roll.
Notifications.NoWoundsFoundToReverse: No matching wounds found to reverse.
Notifications.StatusReversed: Damage has been reversed by GM.
Notifications.WeaponIsJammed: Weapon is jammed! Clear the jam first.

Traits.Label: Traits
Traits.NoWorldTraits: No trait items found in the world.
Traits.AllAdded: All available traits are already added.
Traits.ChooseTraitPrompt: Choose one trait from {source} to copy onto the character:
Traits.SourceNotFound: Could not find the original trait item in the world.

Items.ExportedToSidebar: Item "{name}" added to the items sidebar.

Reputation.Title: Reputation
Reputation.SimpleRollHint: Roll 1d100 — success if result ≤ Value + Fame.
Reputation.RepBonusHint: Additional bonus added directly to reputation value for this roll.

Chat.ArmorReductionStats: {reduced} out of {total} projectiles reduced by armor at {location}
Chat.AllDamageNegated: All damage has been completely negated by the armor!

RequiredTest.NoActor: No character selected. Select a token or assign a character.

HealingRequest.Title: Healing Request
HealingRequest.ChooseMedic: Choose a medic from the list
HealingRequest.OnlyMedicCanOpen: Only the designated medic can open the healing panel
HealingRequest.SelectLocation: Click on a body part to select

MethodDetails.FirstAidDesc: Quick wound treatment immediately after injury
MethodDetails.TreatWoundsDesc: Professional wound treatment, takes about 15 minutes
MethodDetails.TreatWoundsReduction: Successful test: removes 15% penalty (or 10% if First Aid was used first)

HealingRequest.HealingApplied: Healing applied. Wounds marked as healing. Fully healed wounds removed.

Creature.ExperienceHint: Used instead of skills as a general bonus to tests
Creature.KondycjaHint: General physical endurance of the creature

BeastAction.Label: Beast Actions
BeastAction.AlreadyApplied: Beast actions have already been applied.

Vehicle.NoCrew: Drop an actor to add a crew member
Vehicle.SelectCrewFor: Select crew member for weapon roll:
Vehicle.NoCrewInVehicle: No crew members in vehicle. Add an actor to the crew first.

Effects.Label: Label
Effects.ScriptControlled: This effect is controlled by an Enable Script and cannot be manually toggled
Effects.ScriptControlledWarn: This effect is controlled by an Enable Script and cannot be manually toggled.
Effects.TransferTypeHint: Configure how this Active Effect is transferred or applied.
Effects.DocumentTypeHint: What Document to apply the Active Effect to.
Effects.EquipTransferHint: Only transfer this effect when the item is equipped.
Effects.TestHint: Optional test label. Use in scripts as args.effect.test. Supports @item.system.xxx references.
Effects.ToggleManualKeys: Toggle between predefined key list and manual input

Scripts.Label: Label
Scripts.Hint: Scripts are executed automatically or manually. They use JavaScript with access to the actor, item and effect.
Scripts.RunIfDisabledHint: Run this script even when the effect is disabled
Scripts.TargeterHint: Run this script in the dialog of any actor that is targeting this actor
Scripts.DefendingAgainstHint: Run this script in the dialog of an actor that has targeted this actor or item

Help.Item: The item owning this effect (if effect is on an item)
Help.Args: Contextual arguments passed by the trigger

Conditions.StatusLocked: The condition status is locked and cannot be changed.

FireCorrection.Title: Fire Correction
FireCorrection.Applied: Fire correction applied — {cost} bullets spent, {hits} bullet(s) hit.
FireCorrection.NoMagazine: No magazine found for this weapon.
FireCorrection.NotEnoughAmmo: Not enough ammo in the magazine to correct fire.

Background.Title: Character Background
Background.SkillSpecializationsHint: Check the skill specialization groups that this specialization unlocks:

ProseMirror.SelectTextFirst: Select text before choosing a color.

ItemCard.DragHint: Drag onto an actor to assign this item
ItemCard.SelfTakeBlocked: You cannot take your own item from the chat card.

LimitDialog.Title: Available Copies
LimitDialog.Label: How many times can this item be taken? (empty = unlimited)

Disease.Label: Disease
Disease.DotsTooltip: LMB: increase state | RMB: decrease state
Disease.AEHint: Penalties for each disease state are defined via Active Effects with an Enable Script checking the current state.
